queries.question: Which chalets are 300.0 per night and which cabins are the same price per night?
queries.sql:
SELECT Accomodations.name 
FROM Accomodations JOIN Prices ON Accomodations.id = Prices.accommodationId
WHERE Accomodations.type = "Chalet" AND Prices.price_per_night = 300.0
UNION
SELECT Accomodations.name 
FROM Accomodations JOIN Prices ON Accomodations.id = Prices.accommodationId
WHERE Accomodations.type = "Cabin" AND Prices.price_per_night = 300.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?accomodations a :Accommodations .
    ?prices a :Prices .
    ?prices p:hasAccomodations ?accomodations .
    ?accomodations p:name ?name .
    ?accomodations p:type ?type_f .
    ?prices p:price_per_night ?price_per_night_f .
    FILTER(STR(?type_f) = "Chalet")
    FILTER((STR(?price_per_night_f) = "300" || STR(?price_per_night_f) = "300.0"))
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?accomodations a :Accommodations .
    ?prices a :Prices .
    ?prices p:hasAccomodations ?accomodations .
    ?accomodations p:name ?name .
    ?accomodations p:type ?type_f .
    ?prices p:price_per_night ?price_per_night_f .
    FILTER(STR(?type_f) = "Cabin")
    FILTER((STR(?price_per_night_f) = "300" || STR(?price_per_night_f) = "300.0"))
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show chalets and cabins that are 300.0 per night.
queries.sql:
SELECT Accomodations.name 
FROM Accomodations WHERE Accomodations.type = "Chalet"
UNION
SELECT Accomodations.name 
FROM Accomodations JOIN Prices ON Accomodations.id = Prices.accommodationId
WHERE Accomodations.type = "Cabin" AND Prices.price_per_night = 300.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?accomodations a :Accommodations .
    ?accomodations p:name ?name .
    ?accomodations p:type ?type_f .
    FILTER(STR(?type_f) = "Chalet")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?accomodations a :Accommodations .
    ?prices a :Prices .
    ?prices p:hasAccomodations ?accomodations .
    ?accomodations p:name ?name .
    ?accomodations p:type ?type_f .
    ?prices p:price_per_night ?price_per_night_f .
    FILTER(STR(?type_f) = "Cabin")
    FILTER((STR(?price_per_night_f) = "300" || STR(?price_per_night_f) = "300.0"))
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}
